xueersi_esp32_button_setup.tooltip: Initialize the Up, Down, Left, Right, A and B onboard buttons and tick them automatically in the main loop

xueersi_esp32_button_is_pressed.tooltip: Check whether the selected onboard button is currently pressed

xueersi_esp32_button_on_event.tooltip: Handle the selected onboard button with OneButton event semantics

xueersi_esp32_button_set_debounce_ms.message0: set XiaoMiao button %1 debounce time to %2 ms
xueersi_esp32_button_set_debounce_ms.tooltip: Set the debounce time for the selected button

xueersi_esp32_button_set_click_ms.message0: set XiaoMiao button %1 click time to %2 ms
xueersi_esp32_button_set_click_ms.tooltip: Set the click and double-click detection time

xueersi_esp32_button_set_press_ms.message0: set XiaoMiao button %1 long press time to %2 ms

xueersi_esp32_button_set_long_press_inte.message0: set XiaoMiao button %1 long press interval to %2 ms
xueersi_esp32_button_set_long_press_inte.tooltip: Set the repeated callback interval during a long press

xueersi_esp32_button_is_long_pressed.tooltip: Check whether the selected button is in long-pressed state

xueersi_esp32_button_get_pressed_ms.tooltip: Get how long the selected button has been pressed, in milliseconds

xueersi_esp32_button_get_number_clicks.tooltip: Get the recent click count recorded by OneButton

xueersi_esp32_button_reset.tooltip: Reset the OneButton state machine for the selected button
